session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Do NOT modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check code quality

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED

=============================== warnings summary =============================== /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/test_json_command.py:16: DeprecationWarning: 'BaseCommand' is deprecated and will be removed in Click 9.0. Use 'Command' instead. -- Docs: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/how-to/capture-warnings.html 6005 passed, 2 warnings in 25.33s
session.assistant:
## Summary
`make fast-ci` failed with exit code 2. Here's the breakdown of results:
**Failures:**
1. **Prettier formatting** - 2 files have code style issues: - docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md - docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md
2. **Ruff format check** - 1 file would be reformatted: - tests/commands/launch/test_launch_remote_paths.py
3. **Exec Reference Check** - FAIL: - `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is out of date - Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate it
**Passes:**
- Linting: All checks passed (ruff check) - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing: PASSED (19 files) - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 6005 passed, 2 warnings - Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed - Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed - Tests (erk-mcp): 31 passed
The three issues blocking CI are: 2 Prettier formatting violations, 1 ruff format violation, and 1 out-of-date exec reference documentation file.
